body:
cyprozombiegirl:

I’m craving quiet friendly intimate sex, the kind where it’s half cuddling, the kind where you’re not quite sure when it changed from cuddling to sex, the kind where you could’ve sworn you were just watching tv a second ago, the kind where you were just smelling her hair and then your lips met as she turned to you, the kind where it’s nice and easy and welcome, but still sort of a surprise
